purpose: compact proof that push auth, session minting, journal rows, lease fencing, and inspect-first recovery stay tied together

read_only_inspect_requires: session-bound read when inspecting journal or recovery state

blocked_when: fresh live hashes do not match the journaled target
the journal cannot prove a safe finish or rollback
the claim lease has expired and the worker is fenced

required_invariants: push auth must be at least as strict as current Reprint HMAC usage
mutating push requests must carry a push session, idempotency key, and canonical push signature
read-only journal and recovery inspect requests must be signed and session-bound without a mutating idempotency key
retry attempts must be re-signed with a fresh nonce while preserving the same session and, for mutations, the same idempotency key
claim generation and lease expiry fence stale workers before mutation
inspect is read-only and must come before any mutating recovery mode
fresh live hashes must still be checked before finish, rollback, or auto
